summary: Script logic is sound with proper types, error handling, and algorithm clarity. Workflow structure is reasonable (proper permissions, step outputs, env vars). CRITICAL GAPS: (1) tests/test_matrix.py referenced at line 47 but not provided; (2) fixtures/simple.json referenced at line 57 but not provided; (3) act-result.txt (required artifact per task) missing; (4) actions/checkout@v4 (line 21) not pinned to full SHA; (5) no evidence of TDD (failing test first) or tests executed via act. Task explicitly requires all tests run through act and act-result.txt as proof—neither present. Deliverable ~60% complete.
